new_information: Added a dedicated reference ingestion workflow that defines how source documents, including heavy SharePoint-hosted PDFs and office files, are consumed into the context bank through extraction, canonical artifact updates, local ingestion summaries, and optional page-index JSON generation near the document's main topic area.
impact_on_existing_information: The workflows folder now explicitly distinguishes document ingestion from general repository refresh and meeting summarization. Future document-consumption work should delete temporary extraction artifacts, use paired filenames so summaries and page-index trees remain adjacent alphabetically, and require an explicit user decision before generating a page-index JSON.
